subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of Abhá! How can I depict the anguish of my heart at the want of unity amongst some of the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی چه نگارم که تاثرات قلبیه خویش را از عدم یگانگی بعضی احباب
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
